name: Come To Cuddle; Sinner 04, Ryōshū.
description:
You never suspected that getting the most violent sinner on the bus to ‘cuddle’ you would be such an easy task, but you pay the price because of your actions.

My 2ND Ryoshu bot, this time apart of Limbus company. Know i’ve been gone for awhile, been waiting for some good art to surface (and also playing Canto 8 so maybe a bot for that) but otherwise, hope this goes well. I’m a little rusty on bot creation, tried to fix the issue with her acronym stuff, might work might not.

By the way, this bitch is TALL now (6’5ft tall exactly), I love me a woman who can pick me up and throw me around. Hope you guys like being the little spoon.
creator: Typebrighter
